info.name: Nexo Real API
info.description: Complete API collection for Nexo Real Platform - v2.3.5 (Sprint 7: Bot Stability, Frontend Tests, CD Pipeline)

request.description: List active properties with optional filters / Listar propiedades con filtros opcionales
Get property detail by ID / Detalle de propiedad por ID

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Apartamento Zona Rosa",
  "description": "Hermoso apartamento en pleno corazón de Bogotá",
  "type": "rental",
  "price": 1500000,
  "city": "Bogotá",
  "address": "Calle 93 #13-24",
  "bedrooms": 2,
  "bathrooms": 2,
  "area": 85
}

query.description: adventure | cultural | beach | mountain | city | eco | luxury | family

request.description: List active tour packages / Listar paquetes turísticos activos

body.raw:
{

item.name: Nexo Bot

Filter by type (apartment|house|commercial) / Filtrar por tipo

request.description:
Get simplified property listings for Nexo Bot WhatsApp responses. Requires X-Bot-Secret header.

Obtiene propiedades simplificadas para respuestas del Nexo Bot de WhatsApp. Requiere cabecera X-Bot-Secret.
